pr.title: XSA-All 11L + LeakyReLU(0.75)² + Aggressive Legal TTT → 1.1219 BPB

output.summary: Extends XSA to every layer, swaps the MLP to LeakyReLU(0.75)², and runs aggressive score-first legal TTT with 15× higher LR on validation chunks.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Validation chunks are explicitly scored and then adapted via score-first legal TTT training (SGD on each chunk) rather than just evaluated.
techniques: Aggressive score-first legal TTT at LR 0.03
